description:
Perform a Winter Solstice shadow analysis on the provided SketchUp model. The file 'chimney_shadow_study.skp' is located in your Documents folder. Open it in SketchUp Make 2017. 

1. Open the Shadows tray/toolbar and enable shadows.
2. Set the Date to December 21 (Winter Solstice).
3. Set the Time to exactly 10:00 AM.
4. Visually identify which solar panels fall completely or partially within the shadow cast by the central chimney.
5. Select and delete ONLY those shaded panels to optimize the string performance.
6. Leave all unshaded panels intact.
7. Save the modified model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\shadow_cleanup_complete.skp'.
